title: Verify existing rate-limiter implementation
description: The rate-limiting middleware is already fully implemented at src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts with a SlidingWindowRateLimiter class using an in-memory Map, IP-based key resolution via x-forwarded-for headers, and a createRateLimiterMiddleware factory. Unit tests are already in src/middleware/rate-limiter.test.ts covering SlidingWindowRateLimiter behavior, middleware responses (429, headers), IP whitelist/blacklist, concurrent request handling, window expiry, and X-RateLimit headers. The task is complete and passes.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts - Express-style middleware chain pattern with config objects and typed interfaces
src/utils/di-container.ts - Token-based DI with singleton/transient lifecycles
vitest test patterns - tests co-located in *.test.ts files next to source, using describe/it/expect/vi from vitest
